name: Low Fat Banana Nut Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fat Free Macadamia Nut Coffee Creamer
1 envelope Liquid Butter Buds Powder (for that Buttery taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly coat a muffin pan with Pam.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, packed brown sugar, baking powder, allspice, and baking soda; set aside.
4. In another large bowl, beat egg beaters until foamy.
5. Add bananas, dry envelope of liquid butter buds (do not reconstitute, just throw in), coffee creamer, and vanilla to the egg beaters. Stir until just blended.
6. Fold in nuts.
7. Pour batter into prepared muffin pan.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 20-22 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
